tasks.label: docker:up
tasks.detail: Levanta PostgreSQL y Redis con Docker Compose

tasks.label: docker:up:wait
tasks.command: docker compose up -d; $services = @('fuel-price-postgres', 'fuel-price-redis'); $maxAttempts = 30; foreach ($service in $services) { $healthy = $false; for ($attempt = 0; $attempt -lt $maxAttempts; $attempt++) { $status = docker inspect --format '{{if .State.Health}}{{.State.Health.Status}}{{else}}{{.State.Status}}{{end}}' $service 2>$null; if ($status -eq 'healthy' -or $status -eq 'running') { $healthy = $true; break; }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; }; if (-not $healthy) { Write-Error "El servicio $service no está listo para depuración"; exit 1; } }
tasks.detail: Levanta Docker Compose y espera a que PostgreSQL y Redis estén listos

tasks.label: docker:logs
tasks.detail: Muestra logs en tiempo real de los contenedores
